task_completion.description: Create a square root decision node labeled 'Strategy'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A square-shaped node on the EdrawMax canvas containing the text 'Strategy'.

task_completion.description: Create 'Build In-house' and 'Buy Vendor Sol.' branches terminating in circular chance nodes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two lines/branches extending from the 'Strategy' node, labeled 'Build In-house' and 'Buy Vendor Sol.', each ending in a circular shape (chance node).

task_completion.description: Create 'Success' and 'Failure' branches for the 'Build In-house' path with correct outcomes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Branches extending from the 'Build In-house' circular node labeled 'Success (60%)' and 'Failure (40%)', leading to terminal nodes or text showing '$50,000' and '$120,000' respectively.

task_completion.description: Create 'Compatible' and 'Incompatible' branches for the 'Buy Vendor Sol.' path with correct outcomes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Branches extending from the 'Buy Vendor Sol.' circular node labeled 'Compatible (90%)' and 'Incompatible (10%)', leading to terminal nodes or text showing '$80,000' and '$150,000' respectively.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as build_vs_buy_tree.eddx in the Documents directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager window, or the EdrawMax title bar showing 'build_vs_buy_tree.eddx' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as build_vs_buy_tree.png in the Documents directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, file manager window, or image viewer showing 'build_vs_buy_tree.png' successfully created in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application open with the diagram being actively constructed using its tools, rather than terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: The diagram is built using actual shapes and connectors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagram consists of distinct selectable shapes (squares, circles) and connector lines, not just a single pasted image or a single large text box containing all the text.

integrity.description: Files were saved and exported using the application's built-in functions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of EdrawMax 'Save As' and 'Export' dialog boxes being used, rather than terminal commands like 'touch' or 'mv' to create dummy files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected files are 'build_vs_buy_tree.eddx' and 'build_vs_buy_tree.png' located in '/home/ga/Documents/'. The diagram must contain the following specific text labels: 'Strategy', 'Build In-house', 'Buy Vendor Sol', 'Success', '50,000', '120,000', '80,000', and '150,000'.
